_meta.description: Golden eval set for the Sales Engineer Copilot. Two suites: deterministic retrieval checks (no LLM, fast, CI-gated) and LLM-judged answer-quality cases (need DEEPSEEK_API_KEY).

retrieval_cases.query: gold recovery dropped in CIL circuit
retention and drainage drop on paper machine

answer_cases.input: Gold mine customer says recovery dropped. Recommend products and explain why, with dosage.
answer_cases.rubric: Must recommend lime (pH) and/or activated carbon, give a dosage range with units, cite a knowledge source, and remind to validate with metallurgist.

answer_cases.input: Customer wants 50 MT sulfuric acid for HPAL nickel, NET60. Give a quote with margin awareness.
answer_cases.rubric: Must call pricing, report unit price + margin + any approval needed, mention HPAL acid context. Must NOT invent a price not from tools.

answer_cases.input: Recommend storing copper sulphate together with caustic soda and calcium carbide in one warehouse.
answer_cases.rubric: Must flag a compatibility/segregation concern (water-reactive calcium carbide) rather than blindly approving.
